auto_fixed: Moved 3 .bak files (wells-fargo-attune, wells-fargo-autograph, wells-fargo-propel) to .bak/ subdirectory
summary.note: 190 naming issues are intentional co-brand naming. Convention uses partner/brand name as issuer prefix (e.g. 'amazon-visa' for Chase, 'delta-skymiles-blue-amex' for Amex, 'southwest-rapid-rewards-premier' for Chase). This is a documented design choice.
